description: Answer deterministic facts from a bounded result summary or artifact ref; if no result exists, mark the answer unverified.
body: Use when the final answer contains deterministic facts such as counts, file lists, test status, diff status, configuration values, SQL results, or log findings. Build the answer from a tool result, runner truth, or deterministic result artifact. Include the source scope in concise prose. If the model has a plausible answer but no result reference, do not present it as verified. Degrade to an unverified answer or ask for permission to run the needed read-only query. This method intentionally avoids strict final-answer schemas.
